buffer_pool(3) Library Functions Manual buffer_pool(3)

NAME

buffer_pool - Unified buffer pool with lock-free fast path.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/buffer_pool.h>

Data Fields


atomic_ptr_t free_list
Lock-free stack of available buffers (void* cast from buffer_node_t*). mutex_t shrink_mutex
Only used for shrinking. size_t max_bytes
Maximum total bytes allowed. uint64_t shrink_delay_ns
Time before unused buffers freed (nanoseconds).

Atomic counters @{



atomic_t current_bytes
Total bytes in pool (stored as uint64_t). atomic_t used_bytes
Bytes currently in use (stored as uint64_t). atomic_t peak_bytes
Peak bytes in use (stored as uint64_t). atomic_t peak_pool_bytes
Peak bytes in pool (stored as uint64_t). atomic_t hits
Allocations from free list. atomic_t allocs
New buffer allocations. atomic_t returns
Buffers returned to free list. atomic_t shrink_freed
Buffers freed by shrink. atomic_t malloc_fallbacks
Allocations that bypassed pool.

Detailed Description

Unified buffer pool with lock-free fast path.

Definition at line 85 of file buffer_pool.h.
